columns.extraction_plan: The median progression-free survival (PFS) for all patients in the darolutamide arm is reported as "NR" (Not Reached) in Table 2, under the "All Patients" column for "Darolutamide (n = 651)" and the row "Time to CRPC".

The median progression-free survival (PFS) for all patients in the placebo arm is reported as "19.1" months in Table 2, under the "All Patients" column for "Placebo (n = 654)" and the row "Time to CRPC".

The median progression-free survival (PFS) for patients with high volume metastasis in the darolutamide arm is reported as "NR" (Not Reached) in Table 2, under the "High Volume" column for "Darolutamide (n = 497)" and the row "Time to CRPC".

The median progression-free survival (PFS) for patients with high volume metastasis in the placebo arm is reported as "16.4" months in Table 2, under the "High Volume" column for "Placebo (n = 508)" and the row "Time to CRPC".

The median progression-free survival (PFS) for patients with low volume metastasis in the darolutamide arm is reported as "NR" (Not Reached) in Table 2, under the "Low Volume" column for "Darolutamide (n = 154)" and the row "Time to CRPC".

The median progression-free survival (PFS) for patients with low volume metastasis in the placebo arm is reported as "25.8" months in Table 2, under the "Low Volume" column for "Placebo (n = 146)" and the row "Time to CRPC".
